## Checklist

- [ ] My game defines a `run()` function

- [ ] I did NOT add `if __name__ == "__main__"`
- [ ] I removed any `.pyc` files
- [ ] I removed any `.DS_Store` files
- [ ] The game works correctly when launched from `launcher.py`
